❤ MATERIAL& DIMENSION: Multi layer pants jean hangers are made of durable chrome metal and high-quality EVA foam padding. Pants Scarf Hangers Length: 40.5CM(15.9in) x Wideth:43.5CM(17.1in) x Height: 1CM(0.39in) . Big enough to keep your clothing in order.
❤ STURDY CONSTRUCTION & WARM DESIGN: Nice Intensity stainless steel is made to ensure sturdy construction and anti-rust. Designed with a convenient swing arm to easily select and remove the slacks you want to wear with ease. 4 upper layer arms Pants Scarf Hangers can rotate at 360 degree and swing out individually, just easily to hang and take the clothing.
❤ NON SLIP& ANTI SCRACH DESIGN: Made of high quality chrome metal stainless steel, cover with foam pad,can prevent your clothes fall off and protect them from scratching, suit for all kind of material clothes, knitwear, cotton, fleece etc.
